title: Add Attack/Melee tool for entity combat
description:
The agent has no melee attack capability. When user says "punch it" or "attack the creeper", the LLM has no Attack tool available and resorts to sending /attack as a chat message (which does nothing) or using /summon lightning_bolt (creative mode workaround).

Needs:
1. Add "attack" action to the MineflayerAdapter action protocol using bot.attack(entity)
2. Create AttackTool in Agent.Tools that sends the attack action
3. Register AttackTool in the tool registry
4. Update system prompt to describe the attack capability

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
**Linked to external audit (2026-06-29):** The audit confirmed this capability gap — `scanNearbyEntities` fires `entityObserved` events but no action exists to respond to threats. The audit recommends `bot.attack(entity)` plus a retreat goal using `GoalInvert`/`GoalAvoidEntity`. Council deferred to post-Sprint 56, gated on TSK-0146 (entity observation re-enable).

See: `Data/Pages/Audits/mineflayer-audit-claude-06-29-26.md` and `Data/Pages/council/mineflayer-external-audit-council-2026-06-29.md`
